name: rename
description: Rename/move one or more files or directories. Supports pairs mode (v1 compat) and rule-based mode (file_pattern + replace/prefix/suffix/extension). Rule-based mode: find files matching file_pattern, apply prefix → suffix → replace → extension renaming rules. Use dry_run=true to preview. Supports overwrite flag for existing file conflicts. Returns results with === section separators.

file_pattern.description: Glob pattern to match files for rule-based renaming.

from.description: String to replace in filename (before extension).

replace.description: Replace rule: {from, to} applied to filenames (before extension).

prefix.description: Prefix to add to filenames (before extension).

suffix.description: Suffix to add to filenames (before extension).

extension.description: Target file extension (e.g. '.md'). Replaces existing extension.

dry_run.description: If true, preview changes without actually renaming.

overwrite.description: If true, allow overwriting existing files.
